sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bucket (id UInt32, value Float64, timestamp DateTime, category String, low_bound Float64, high_bound Float64);
SELECT id, widthBucket(value, low_bound, high_bound, 18) AS bucket FROM test_bucket WHERE value GLOBAL IN (SELECT value FROM test_bucket WHERE category = 'A') ORDER BY bucket;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT id, widthBucket(value, low_bound, high_bound, 5) AS bucket FROM test_bucket GROUP BY id, bucket HAVING bucket > 0) GROUP BY id HAVING count > 1;
INSERT INTO test_bucket_copy SELECT id, widthBucket(value, low_bound, high_bound, 10) AS modified_value, timestamp, category, low_bound, high_bound FROM test_bucket_copy WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, widthBucket(value, -10, 50, 25) AS bucket, category FROM test_bucket WHERE category GLOBAL IN (SELECT DISTINCT category FROM test_bucket WHERE low_bound < 0) ORDER BY value;
SELECT DISTINCT category, MAX(widthBucket(value, low_bound, high_bound, 12)) AS max_bucket FROM test_bucket GROUP BY category HAVING max_bucket IS NOT NULL HAVING max_bucket >= 5;

SELECT id, widthBucket(value, low_bound, high_bound, 15) AS bucket FROM (SELECT id, value, low_bound, high_bound FROM test_bucket_copy) WHERE bucket = (SELECT MAX(widthBucket(value, low_bound, high_bound, 15)) FROM test_bucket) GLOBAL IN (1, 2);

SELECT id, widthBucket(10.15, -8.6, 30.0, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_bucket WHERE category = 'C')) AS bucket_val FROM test_bucket WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_bucket_copy WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
